zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Ormsby於1540年出生在英國林可爾史爾帕特尼時，他的父親Richard Ormesby31歲，母親Joanne Kendelby27歲。他於1569年與Sarah Mary Malby在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1570年在愛爾蘭被列為m-- roll, court of exchequeor,。他去世於1569年之後在英國林可爾史爾素斯 奧斯比 煙雨 凱茲比 安德 卡爾比 安德 德利比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Ormsby于1540年出生在英国林可爾史爾帕特尼时，他的父亲Richard Ormesby31岁，母亲Joanne Kendelby27岁。他于1569年与Sarah Mary Malby在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1570年在爱尔兰被列为m-- roll, court of exchequeor,。他去世于1569年之后在英国林可爾史爾素斯 奧斯比 煙雨 凱茲比 安德 卡爾比 安德 德利比。

nameMeanings.name: Ormsby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from North and South Ormsby (Lincolnshire), or either of two places called Ormesby in Norfolk and the North Yorkshire. The placenames all derive from the Old Norse personal name Ormr + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. This surname is also common in Ireland (Connacht), where it has been established since the late 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Henry VIII dies, succeeded by the boy king Edward VI. England and Ireland were ruled by the senior nobility of England.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Ormsby was born in 1540, in Partney, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Richard Ormesby, was 31 and his mother, Joanne Kendelby, was 27. He married Sarah Mary Malby in 1569, in County Waterford, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. In 1570, at the age of 30, his occupation is listed as m-- roll, court of exchequeor, in Ireland. He died after 1569, in South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Ormsby est né en 1540, à Partney, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ormesby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joanne Kendelby, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Mary Malby en 1569, à County Waterford, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. En 1570, à l’âge de 30 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est m-- roll, court of exchequeor, à Irlande. Il est décédé après 1569, à South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Ormsby 1540 in Partney, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Ormesby 31 und seine Mutter Joanne Kendelby 27. Er hat 1569 in County Waterford, Irland Sarah Mary Malby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1570, als er 30 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als m-- roll, court of exchequeor, in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb nach 1569 in South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, England.

Nel 1570, all'età di 30 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come m-- roll, court of exchequeor, nel Irlanda. ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Ormsby(이)가 1540년 영국 링코실르 파르트니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Ormesby(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanne Kendelby(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1569년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드에서 Sarah Mary Malby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1570년, 30세의 나이로 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 m-- roll, court of exchequeor,이었다. 그는 1569년 이후 영국 링코실르 소우스 오메스비 위스 케츠비 앤드 캘스비 앤드 드리비에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Ormsby nasceu em 1540, em Partney, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ormesby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joanne Kendelby, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Mary Malby em 1569, em County Waterford, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1570, com 30 anos, sua profissão aparece como m-- roll, court of exchequeor, em Irlanda. Ele faleceu após 1569, em South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby an: соут ормесби вит кецби анд калсеби анд дриби, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Ormsby родился в 1540 г. в местности партни, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Ormesby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joanne Kendelby, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Mary Malby в 1569 г. в местности коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. В 1570 году, в возрасте 30 лет,  он работал по профессии m-- roll, court of exchequeor, в местности Ирландия. Он умер после 1569 г. в местности соут ормесби вит кецби анд калсеби анд дриби, линколншир, Англия.

Se casó con Sarah Mary Malby en 1569, en County Waterford, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1569, en South Ormesby with Ketsby and Calceby and Driby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
